response: To cut out sugar from your daily diet, start by reading [labels] carefully and avoiding products with added sugars. Replace sugary snacks with [healthy alternatives] like fruits or nuts. Limit sweetened beverages and choose water or unsweetened drinks. Gradually reduce sugar intake to avoid cravings. Be mindful of hidden sugars in sauces and condiments. Track your progress to stay motivated. Make gradual changes for long-term success. Share your journey with friends for support.
